Quest

Another Dimension: Part 2

Travel / deliver to AF Security Gate

Start Here

  • Location: AF Security Gate in Durian

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to AF Security Gate.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Another Dimension: Part 3.

Quest Text

Description

AF Lieutenant Abraham: "The data indicates the Renegades have a cloaked science vessel in Durian working on dark matter technology. Dark matter is potentially the most dangerous element in the universe so its ciritcal that we stop them. Goto the AF Security Gate in Durian and scan for any unusual impulse signatures that could indicate a moving vessel."

Completion

AF Lieutenant Abraham: "We have found the science vessel. The scan also indicates that they are trying to contain its singularity core. Probably to harvest dark matter.

Experimenting on the singularity might also cause a space distorsion and create a dimensional rift. We need to stop them before that happens!"
